description_long: This is a military-style motorcycle with a matte olive drab finish, featuring a prominent fuel tank adorned with a white star insignia. The motorcycle is equipped with a single leather saddle seat, large fenders, and robust spoked wheels. It has a side-mounted cylindrical storage container and a rear cargo rack, both typical of utility or military motorcycles. The front is fitted with a round headlamp, twin rear-view mirrors, and protective crash bars. The exhaust system runs low along the side, and the rear features dual cylindrical tail lights. The overall design is rugged, utilitarian, and built for durability in demanding environments.
description: A rugged, olive drab military motorcycle with a white star insignia, leather saddle seat, and side-mounted storage. Features include spoked wheels, crash bars, and a rear cargo rack.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white star insignia, leather saddle, side-mounted storage, and full profile of the wheels and exhaust.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the round headlamp, twin mirrors, wide handlebars, and front fender.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the fuel tank, saddle, rear cargo rack, and the other side of the exhaust and storage.
description_view_3: Rear view showing dual cylindrical tail lights, rear cargo rack, and the back of the saddle and fenders.
